texto: every particle being connected with every other
autor: you can't fart without changing the balance in the universe. It makes living a funny joke with nobody around to laugh.
explicacao: Citação de you can't fart without changing the balance in the universe. It makes living a funny joke with nobody around to laugh. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “every particle being connected with every other” articula reflexao, philip-k-dick, every em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
